Unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action, please login first.
AccountLocked: Account is temporarily locked due to multiple failed login attempts. Please try again after a short period.
Emailconfirmationfailed: Email confirmation failed. The confirmation code is invalid or has expired.
Emailconfirmed: Email confirmed successfully. You can now log in to your account.
Passwordresetfailed: Password reset failed. The reset code is invalid or has expired.
